project.name: Cubeage Solar2D Linux
project.summary: Linux Solar2DBuilder artifact producer for Android APK builds on CI, owning the Solar2D patch set, build script, release workflow, and published tarballs.
goals: Produce Linux Solar2DBuilder packages for Android build pipelines.
Track upstream Solar2D releases and apply the patch set needed for Linux Android builds.
Publish reproducible release artifacts with smoke evidence and release readback.
nonGoals: Do not own the upstream Solar2D runtime, game source code, or Android app release behavior.
Do not own consumer CI workflows beyond the published Solar2DBuilder package contract.
Do not own central CI runner, enterprise release bot, or platform preview behavior.

owns.name: solar2d-linux-patch-set
owns.description: Repository patches that adapt upstream Solar2D source for Linux Android APK builds.

owns.name: solar2d-linux-build-tooling
owns.description: Build script and workflow that compile, package, and smoke test Linux Solar2DBuilder.

owns.name: solar2d-linux-release-artifacts
owns.description: GitHub Release tarballs consumed by downstream Android build pipelines.

doesNotOwn: Upstream Solar2D runtime behavior, source releases, or release cadence.
Game source code, APK signing, app-store submission behavior, or consumer application release policy.
Central Sylphx preview platform, central CI runner capacity, branch protection policy, or enterprise release bot behavior.
forbiddenCouplings: Do not add game-specific APK build policy or app release behavior to the package producer.
Do not patch downstream consumer workflows from this repository.
Do not treat source revert as sufficient recovery after release tarballs have been published.
Do not encode central release-bot, runner-capacity, secret-management, or branch-protection policy as build-tool behavior.

delivery.deployPath: The .github/workflows/build.yml workflow checks upstream Solar2D releases, builds Linux Solar2DBuilder, smoke tests it, and publishes GitHub Release tarballs on schedule or workflow_dispatch. No required PR status context is currently configured in branch protection.
delivery.productionProof: Release changes require upstream Solar2D version evidence, patch application proof, package smoke output, GitHub Release asset readback, and downstream compatibility notes. Manifest-only changes are proven by the doctrine project-control audit.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Current state is schedule or workflow_dispatch release intent from .github/workflows/build.yml; dedicated release-intent PR is not yet adopted.
packageRelease.versionPr: Not currently implemented; future path should use a bot-owned version or release PR before publishing release artifacts.
packageRelease.publisher: .github/workflows/build.yml currently publishes GitHub Releases with repository workflow permissions; future path should use a dedicated least-privilege release GitHub App or bot.
packageRelease.publishProof: GitHub Release readback for solar2dbuilder-linux-<BUILD>.tar.gz plus smoke output from the workflow.

gaps.description: Branch protection has no required PR status contexts for build-tool or release changes.
Release artifacts are currently published by schedule or workflow_dispatch without a dedicated release GitHub App or bot-owned version PR.
Repository has not adopted central ADR-29 stable admission fan-in contexts.
gaps.target: Central CI runner and admission control plane
